steps.title: Use quadratic regression to get b
steps.content: The expression is equivalent to $ax^2+bx+c$, and the question asks only for $b$. A fast Desmos method is to evaluate the expression at three x-values and fit the result to a quadratic.

steps.title: Read the coefficient
steps.content: The regression gives $a=135$, $b=-384$, and $c=-112$. Therefore the value of $b$ is -384.

steps.title: Confirm with FOIL
steps.content: The $x$ term comes from the cross products: $9x\cdot4=36x$ and $-28\cdot15x=-420x$. Since $36-420=-384$, the answer is -384.
